'''homamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucephalous|eucephalous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucephalous|eucephalous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| homamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:homamithi|homamithi]] || [[word:homamiji|homamiji]] || [[word:homamishi|homamishi]] || [[word:homamiki|homamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:homamuthuthu|homamuthuthu]] || [[word:homamujuju|homamujuju]] || [[word:homamushushu|homamushushu]] || [[word:homamukuku|homamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:homamuthu|homamuthu]] || [[word:homamuju|homamuju]] || [[word:homamushu|homamushu]] || [[word:homamuku|homamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:homamufthuf|homamufthuf]] || [[word:homamufjuf|homamufjuf]] || [[word:homamufshuf|homamufshuf]] || [[word:homamufkuf|homamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:homamethe|homamethe]] || [[word:homameje|homameje]] || [[word:homameshe|homameshe]] || [[word:homameke|homameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:homamothotho|homamothotho]] || [[word:homamojojo|homamojojo]] || [[word:homamoshosho|homamoshosho]] || [[word:homamokoko|homamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:homamotho|homamotho]] || [[word:homamojo|homamojo]] || [[word:homamosho|homamosho]] || [[word:homamoko|homamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:homamofthof|homamofthof]] || [[word:homamofjof|homamofjof]] || [[word:homamofshof|homamofshof]] || [[word:homamofkof|homamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:homamÃŸfthÃŸf|homamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfjÃŸf|homamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfshÃŸf|homamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfkÃŸf|homamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:homamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|homamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|homamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|homamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|homamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:homamÃŸfthÃŸf|homamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfjÃŸf|homamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfshÃŸf|homamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfkÃŸf|homamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:homamÃŸfthÃŸf|homamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfjÃŸf|homamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfshÃŸf|homamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:homamÃŸfkÃŸf|homamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:homamÃḊthÃḊ|homamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:homamÃḊjÃḊ|homamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:homamÃḊshÃḊ|homamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:homamÃḊkÃḊ|homamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:homamathatha|homamathatha]] || [[word:homamajaja|homamajaja]] || [[word:homamashasha|homamashasha]] || [[word:homamakaka|homamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:homamatha|homamatha]] || [[word:homamaja|homamaja]] || [[word:homamasha|homamasha]] || [[word:homamaka|homamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:homamafthaf|homamafthaf]] || [[word:homamafjaf|homamafjaf]] || [[word:homamafshaf|homamafshaf]] || [[word:homamafkaf|homamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:homamasha|homamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:homamshÃḋsha|homamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:homamrosha|homamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:homamusha|homamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:homamyasha|homamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohomamnkshÃḋsha|gohomamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohomamnkrosha|gohomamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohomamnkmusha|gohomamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohomamnkyasha|gohomamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:homamamasha|homamamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:homamamshÃḋsha|homamamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:homamamrosha|homamamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:homamamusha|homamamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:homamamyasha|homamamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohomamamnkshÃḋsha|gohomamamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohomamamnkrosha|gohomamamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohomamamnkmusha|gohomamamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohomamamnkyasha|gohomamamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hemÃḊmasha|hemÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hemÃḊmshÃḋsha|hemÃḊmshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hemÃḊmrosha|hemÃḊmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hemÃḊmusha|hemÃḊmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hemÃḊmyasha|hemÃḊmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohemÃḊmnkshÃḋsha|gohemÃḊmnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohemÃḊmnkrosha|gohemÃḊmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohemÃḊmnkmusha|gohemÃḊmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohemÃḊmnkyasha|gohemÃḊmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:homfamasha|homfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:homfamshÃḋsha|homfamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:homfamrosha|homfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:homfamusha|homfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:homfamyasha|homfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohomfamnkshÃḋsha|gohomfamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohomfamnkrosha|gohomfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohomfamnkmusha|gohomfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohomfamnkyasha|gohomfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
